articles.title: 'One small brave step': These female survivors are walking the runway at Fashion For Cancer 2025
articles.content: All three women came to the CNA Women interview without a trace of makeup. None of them were models or ever wanted to be one. She had a rare bone cancer, osteosarcoma. And there was 49-year-old mother-of-three Chua Gek San, who had leukaemia. Doctors had to remove her nose bone entirely. Proceeds for tickets will fund cancer research and patient support.
articles.summary:
📰 제목: 암 극복 여성들, 2025 패션쇼 무대에 서다

내용: 세 명의 여성 암 생존자들이 메이크업 없이 CNA 우먼 인터뷰에 등장했다. 그들은 모델이 아니지만, 암을 이겨내고 용기 있게 런웨이에 선다. 뼈암, 백혈병 환자도 참여하며, 수익금은 암 연구와 환자 지원에 쓰인다.
